ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ROVEN, JUSTIN W. ROVEN, JEFFREY

C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED AS TO THE ISSUE OF RETITUTION OF THE PREMISE AS TO BOTH NAMED DEFENDANTS. RESTITUTION RESOLUTION SHALL NOT ACT AS RES JUDICATA IN FUTURE ACTIONS TO DETERMINE MONEY DAMAGES OR OTHER CLAIMS. THOUGH RESTITUTION IS GRANTED, THERE IS NO PREVAILING PARTY. ALSO THERE ARE NO ATTOREY FEES IN THIS ACTION. PROVE UP AS TO DEFENDANT JUSTIN ROVEN. SEE CLERK NOTES FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROVEN, JUSTIN W. ROVEN, JEFFREY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 77 TERESITA ST SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION WILL HAVE NO RES JUDICATA AFFECT ON ANY FUTURE LITIGATION BETWEEN PARTIES RELATING TO 77 TERESI- TA. THIS JUDGMENT MAY NOT BE INTRODUCED AS EVIDENCE NOR USED IN ANY FASHION TO PROVE CLAIMS IN ANY FURTHER ACTION AGAINST DOLAN AND ROVEN. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER STIPULATION
